LeaderboardEntry.title: Leaderboard Entry
LeaderboardEntry.description: A single best score entry for a specific user on a specific map

date.description: The date the score was achieved

uid.description: The unique ID of the player (Firebase Auth UID)

/leaderboards/{entryId}.description: Global leaderboard entries for all maps

/leaderboard_emails/{entryId}.description: Private emails for leaderboard entries, only readable by admin
